summary: The notebook currently holds two featured notes: a foundations course note on gradient descent and a reading note on the Transformer paper, spanning machine learning and deep learning.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: A single ml-foundations course note covers gradient descent basics, the update rule, a worked quadratic example, and learning-rate pitfalls.
areas.gap: The course suggests more topics such as linear models, classification, and regularization, but no further ml-foundations notes exist yet.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: One reviewed reading note covers the Transformer architecture: scaled dot-product attention, multi-head attention, positional encodings, and WMT 2014 results.
areas.gap: No notes yet on newer architectures, training-stability recipes, or follow-up work like sparse or sub-quadratic attention variants.
